Id1.text: The manager of A.F.C. Blackpool is Stuart Parker (footballer), who plays at the Sparta Rotterdam club.

Id2.text: Stuart Parker, who plays at the Sparta Rotterdam Club, has also managed AFC Blackpool.

Id3.text: AFC Blackpool have had the manager Stuart Parker who currently plays for Sparta Rotterdam.
